purpose: Maintains process vacuum pressure by evacuating air and process vapors from the system

inputs.name: main_vacuum_valve
inputs.description: Control signal for main vacuum valve operation

outputs.name: vacuum_fail_alarm
outputs.description: Alarm signal indicating vacuum pump failure or performance degradation

outputs.name: evacuation_time
outputs.description: Time required to achieve target vacuum pressure

states.name: oil_contamination_level
states.description: Level of oil contamination from process vapours

states.name: pump_seal_wear
states.description: Wear level of pump seals from corrosive gases

events.name: motor_overheating
events.description: Motor overheats due to restricted air-flow

events.name: oil_contamination
events.description: Oil becomes cloudy or discoloured from process vapours

parameters.name: oil_contamination_rate
parameters.description: Rate of oil contamination accumulation when pump is operating

parameters.name: seal_wear_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for pump seal degradation

parameters.name: base_motor_temp
parameters.description: Base motor temperature when not operating

parameters.name: temp_rise_factor
parameters.description: Temperature rise factor due to seal wear

parameters.name: base_evacuation_time
parameters.description: Base evacuation time for healthy pump

parameters.name: contamination_time_factor
parameters.description: Evacuation time increase factor due to oil contamination

parameters.name: seal_wear_time_factor
parameters.description: Evacuation time increase factor due to seal wear

parameters.name: motor_overheat_threshold
parameters.description: Motor temperature threshold for overheating alarm

parameters.name: oil_contamination_threshold
parameters.description: Oil contamination level threshold for warning

parameters.name: seal_wear_threshold
parameters.description: Seal wear threshold for electrical failure risk

parameters.name: motor_temp_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Motor temperature threshold for electrical failure

state_transition_logic: oil_contamination_level increases by oil_contamination_rate * main_vacuum_valve * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
pump_seal_wear decreases by (1.0 / seal_wear_timescale) * main_vacuum_valve * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]

motor_temperature tracks target temperature using first-order lag with coefficient temp_tracking_coeff, where target = base_motor_temp + (operating_motor_temp - base_motor_temp + temp_rise_factor * (1.0 - pump_seal_wear)) * main_vacuum_valve, clamped to [20.0, 120.0]
output_logic: evacuation_time = base_evacuation_time + contamination_time_factor * oil_contamination_level + seal_wear_time_factor * (1.0 - pump_seal_wear)
vacuum_fail_alarm = true if motor_temperature > motor_overheat_threshold or pump_seal_wear < seal_wear_threshold, false otherwise
event_logic: motor_electrical_failure occurs when pump_seal_wear < seal_wear_threshold or motor_temperature > motor_temp_failure_threshold
assumptions: Oil contamination accumulates only when pump is operating (main_vacuum_valve = true)
Seal wear is accelerated by corrosive process gases during operation
Motor temperature rises with operation and increases further due to seal wear reducing efficiency
Evacuation time increases with both oil contamination and seal wear
Motor electrical failure risk increases with both excessive seal wear and high temperature
